{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Territories (Cradle)
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Locals in [[Amalgam]] call the balls of color and potential clinging to it Territories.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
